sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: AMD는 2025년 4분기 매출 103억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: AMD는 2025년 4분기 매출 103억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 분기 매출을 달성했습니다.
고성능 EPYC 및 Ryzen CPU의 채택 가속화와 데이터 센터 AI 사업의 급격한 확장이 성장을 견인했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 고성능 및 적응형 컴퓨팅 제품 포트폴리오 전반에 걸쳐 장기적인 성장을 지원하기 위한 전략적 투자를 지속하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP 기준 영업이익은 18억 달러, 희석 주당순이익은 0.92달러를 기록했습니다.
4분기 Non-GAAP 기준 영업이익은 29억 달러로 사상 최대치를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 데이터 센터 AI 프랜차이즈의 확장 속도와 고성능 CPU 제품군의 시장 점유율 유지 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q42025991.htm EX-99.1 Document NEWS RELEASE Media Contact: Phil Hughes AMD Communications 512-865-9697 phil.hughes@amd.com Investor Contact: Liz Stine AMD Investor Relations 720-652-3965 liz.stine@amd.com AMD Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results SANTA CLARA, Calif. ― February 3, 2026 ― AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) today announced financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Fourth quarter revenue was a record $10.3 billion, gross margin was 54%, operating income was $1.8 billion, net income was $1.5 billion and diluted earnings per share was $0.92. On a non-GAAP (*) basis, gross margin was 57%, operating income was a record $2.9 billion,   Normalized numeric aliases: $10.3 billion = 103억 달러; $1.8 billion = 18억 달러; $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $34.6 billion = 346억 달러; $3.7 billion = 37억 달러; $10.3 = 10.3달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $34.6 = 34.6달러; $0.92 = 0.92달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $1.53 = 1.53달러; $3.7 = 3.7달러.

et income of $4.3 billion, and diluted earnings per share of $2.65. On a non-GAAP (*) basis, gross margin was 52%, operating income was a record $7.8 billion, net income was a record $6.8 billion and diluted earnings per share was a record $4.17. “2025 was a defining year for AMD, with record revenue and earnings driven by strong execution and broad-based demand for our high-performance and AI platforms,” said Dr. Lisa Su, AMD chair and CEO. “We are entering 2026 with strong momentum across our business, led by accelerating adoption of our high-performance EPYC and Ryzen CPUs and the rapid scaling of our data center AI franchise.” “Our record fourth quarter and full-year results demonstrate AMD’s ability to deliver profitable growth at scale,” said Jean Hu, AMD executive vice president, CFO and treasurer. “We achieve  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.3 billion = 43억 달러; $7.8 billion = 78억 달러; $6.8 billion = 68억 달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러; $2.65 = 2.65달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러; $6.8 = 6.8달러; $4.17 = 4.17달러.

our strategic investments to support long-term growth across our high-performance and adaptive computing product portfolio.” 1 GAAP Quarterly Financial Results Q4 2025 Q4 2024 Y/Y Q3 2025 Q/Q Revenue ($M) $10,270 $7,658 Up 34% $9,246 Up 11% Gross profit ($M) $5,577 $3,882 Up 44% $4,780 Up 17% Gross margin 54% 51% Up 3 ppts 52% Up 2 ppts Operating expenses ($M) $3,825 $3,011 Up 27% $3,510 Up 9% Operating income ($M) $1,752 $871 Up 101% $1,270 Up 38% Operating margin 17% 11% Up 6 ppts 14% Up 3 ppts Net income ($M) $1,511 $482 Up 213% $1,243 Up 22% Diluted earn  Normalized numeric aliases: $7,658 = 7,658달러; $9,246 = 9,246달러; $5,577 = 5,577달러; $3,882 = 3,882달러; $4,780 = 4,780달러; $3,825 = 3,825달러; $3,011 = 3,011달러; $3,510 = 3,510달러; $871 = 871달러; $0.92 = 0.92달러; $4,992 = 4,992달러; 7,658 million = 76억 5,800만 달러; 3,825 million = 38억 2,500만 달러; 1,511 million = 15억 1,100만 달러; 3,001 million = 30억 100만 달러; 5,855 million = 58억 5,500만 달러; 4,140 million = 41억 4,000만 달러; 4,992 million = 49억 9,200만 달러.
